scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:admin & npm run dev:web & npm run dev:portal & npm run dev:marketplace
scripts.publish:all: npm run build && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/core --access public && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/sdk --access public && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/adapter-mock --access public && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/adapter-rtl-sdr --access public && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/adapter-usb-camera --access public && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/server --access public && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/cloud --access public && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/cli --access public && npm publish --workspace=@fredabila/oahl --access public && npm run publish:python
scripts.publish:all:dry-run: npm run build && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/core --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/sdk --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/adapter-mock --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/adapter-rtl-sdr --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/adapter-usb-camera --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/server --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/cloud --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@oahl/cli --access public --dry-run && npm publish --workspace=@fredabila/oahl --access public --dry-run
scripts.publish:all:auto: npm run version:bump:patch && npm run publish:all
scripts.publish:all:auto:minor: npm run version:bump:minor && npm run publish:all
scripts.publish:all:auto:major: npm run version:bump:major && npm run publish:all
scripts.publish:all:auto:prerelease: npm run version:bump:prerelease && npm run publish:all
scripts.publish:python: npm run version:bump:patch && cd sdk-python && node -e "fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && python -m build && python -m twine upload dist/*
